TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Takanua, title = Takanua, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Takanua} }

S.FORM: alang Takanua ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Namasya Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 243 buwan, 998 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 958 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 40 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 65%, Cou 16%, Kanakanabu 12%, Paywan 1%, Tayan 1%, Amis 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Takanua hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Takanua hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Takanua hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Takanua hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Takanua hya' ga Masinghalan. tay mkyahu' na Takanua hya' ga Maia. kayal qalang ru cingay qalax qu kayal nya'. qmisan lga, hzyaq balay maki' te rgyax hiya'. rekisi kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Takanua ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Namasya Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 243 buwan, 998 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 958 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 40 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 65%, Cou 16%, Kanakanabu 12%, Paywan 1%, Tayan 1%, Amis 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Takanua hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Takanua hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Takanua hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Takanua hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Takanua hya' ga Masinghalan. tay mkyahu' na Takanua hya' ga Maia. kayal qalang ru cingay qalax qu kayal nya'. qmisan lga, hzyaq balay maki' te rgyax hiya'. rekisi kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ takanua ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu namas~ɕja ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, ʦ~ʨou **%, kanakanaβu **%, pajwan *%, tajan *%, amis~ɕ *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na takanua ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na takanua ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na takanua ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na takanua ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na takanua ħjaʔ ɣa mas~ɕiŋħalan. taj mkjaħuʔ na takanua ħjaʔ ɣa maia. kajal qalaŋ ru ʦ~ʨiŋaj qalax qu kajal njaʔ. qmis~ɕan lɣa, ħzjaq βalaj makiʔ te rɣjax ħijaʔ. rekis~ɕi kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
